environment.description: Whether the read-only admin console is served at /console (ADR 0013). Off by default.
environment.name: ADMIN_CONSOLE_ENABLED

environment.description: Comma-separated allowlist of approved model IDs.
environment.name: ALLOWED_MODELS

environment.description: Whether streaming chat completions are admitted (shipped on; the regulated-offline profile disables it).
environment.name: ALLOW_STREAMING

environment.description: Whether business endpoints require API key or bearer-token auth.
environment.name: API_KEY_AUTH_ENABLED

environment.description: Header name accepted for API key authentication.
environment.name: API_KEY_HEADER

environment.description: Optional path to a JSON/YAML API-key records file (per-key scopes, expiry, sandbox binding, budget overrides); a malformed file fails closed at startup. Mount it via auth.keyRecords.existingSecret.
environment.name: API_KEY_RECORDS_PATH

environment.description: Comma-separated SHA-256 API key hashes.
environment.name: API_KEY_SHA256S

environment.description: Whether redacted audit logging is enabled.
environment.name: AUDIT_LOG_ENABLED

environment.description: Whether the asynchronous OpenAI Files + Batch API (/v1/files, /v1/batches) is served. Off by default; needs an object store and a Redis-backed store + queue plus the batch-processor worker.
environment.name: BATCH_API_ENABLED

environment.description: Completion window honored as an expiry bound (e.g. 24h, 30m).
environment.name: BATCH_COMPLETION_WINDOW

environment.description: Redis key prefix for batch records, indexes, and the work queue.
environment.name: BATCH_KEY_PREFIX

environment.description: Maximum size in bytes of an uploaded batch input file.
environment.name: BATCH_MAX_FILE_BYTES

environment.description: Maximum number of request lines in a batch input file.
environment.name: BATCH_MAX_REQUESTS_PER_BATCH

environment.description: Object-store backend for batch JSONL blobs.
environment.name: BATCH_OBJECT_STORE_BACKEND

environment.description: Root directory for the filesystem object-store backend (single-node/local).
environment.name: BATCH_OBJECT_STORE_ROOT

environment.description: Redis batch-store operation timeout in seconds.
environment.name: BATCH_REDIS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environment.description: Redis URL for the shared batch store + queue when backend is redis.
environment.name: BATCH_REDIS_URL

environment.description: Retention horizon in seconds for completed batches and their files before GC.
environment.name: BATCH_RETENTION_SECONDS

environment.description: S3 access key id for the s3 object-store backend.
environment.name: BATCH_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID

environment.description: S3 bucket holding batch blobs when the object-store backend is s3.
environment.name: BATCH_S3_BUCKET

environment.description: S3/MinIO endpoint URL for the s3 object-store backend.
environment.name: BATCH_S3_ENDPOINT_URL

environment.description: S3 region used for request signing.
environment.name: BATCH_S3_REGION

environment.description: S3 secret access key; source it from batch.objectStore.s3.existingSecret in production.
environment.name: BATCH_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

environment.description: Backend for batch file/job records and the work queue.
environment.name: BATCH_STORE_BACKEND

environment.description: Case-insensitive substrings rejected anywhere in prompt/embedding input.
environment.name: BLOCKED_CONTENT_TERMS

environment.description: Prompt-character to token estimate used for budget accounting.
environment.name: BUDGET_ESTIMATED_CHARS_PER_TOKEN

environment.description: Currency label for the /v1/usage cost estimate.
environment.name: COST_CURRENCY

environment.description: Fallback sandbox ID when callers do not send X-Sandbox-ID.
environment.name: DEFAULT_SANDBOX_ID

environment.description: Flat token estimate charged per image_url content part so multimodal prompts are metered.
environment.name: IMAGE_PART_TOKEN_ESTIMATE

environment.description: Expected JWT audience when set.
environment.name: JWT_AUDIENCE

environment.description: Whether JWT bearer-token validation is accepted beside API key auth.
environment.name: JWT_AUTH_ENABLED

environment.description: JWKS cache TTL in seconds.
environment.name: JWT_CACHE_SECONDS

environment.description: Expected JWT issuer when set.
environment.name: JWT_ISSUER

environment.description: JWKS URL used by optional JWT validation.
environment.name: JWT_JWKS_URL

environment.description: Scopes required in JWT scope or scp claims.
environment.name: JWT_REQUIRED_SCOPES

environment.description: JWT claim that binds the sandbox id; mismatched or missing values are rejected. Empty disables binding.
environment.name: JWT_TENANT_CLAIM

environment.description: Maximum number of chat requests accepted in one /v1/batch-inference call.
environment.name: MAX_BATCH_REQUESTS

environment.description: Maximum completions per request (the OpenAI 'n' parameter); the completion budget is charged n times.
environment.name: MAX_COMPLETIONS_PER_REQUEST

environment.description: Maximum requested completion tokens (honors both max_tokens and max_completion_tokens).
environment.name: MAX_COMPLETION_TOKENS

environment.description: Max in-flight requests before load shedding with 503; zero disables the limit.
environment.name: MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS

environment.description: Maximum decoded size of a single data-URL image part; zero disables the check.
environment.name: MAX_IMAGE_BYTES

environment.description: Maximum messages accepted per chat request.
environment.name: MAX_MESSAGES

environment.description: Maximum aggregate prompt characters accepted per request.
environment.name: MAX_PROMPT_CHARS

environment.description: Maximum tool/function definitions accepted per request.
environment.name: MAX_TOOLS

environment.description: Maximum serialized characters of tool/function definitions per request.
environment.name: MAX_TOOL_CHARS

environment.description: Default model used when requests omit a model.
environment.name: MODEL_ID

environment.description: Optional path to a platform.ai/v1alpha1 ModelRoutingPolicy YAML file.
environment.name: MODEL_ROUTING_POLICY_PATH

environment.description: Base URL for the Ollama runtime.
environment.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL

environment.description: OTLP/HTTP endpoint for span export when tracing is enabled.
environment.name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT

environment.description: Service name attribute attached to exported spans.
environment.name: OTEL_SERVICE_NAME

environment.description: Whether OpenTelemetry span export is enabled.
environment.name: OTEL_TRACING_ENABLED

environment.description: Whether the response-path output guardrail inspects model completions (OWASP LLM02/LLM06).
environment.name: OUTPUT_GUARDRAIL_ENABLED

environment.description: Action on a flagged completion.
environment.name: OUTPUT_GUARDRAIL_MODE

environment.description: Built-in detector names scanned on model output (credentials + PII by default).
environment.name: OUTPUT_GUARDRAIL_PATTERNS

environment.description: Whether prompt credential-pattern detection is enabled.
environment.name: PROMPT_SECRET_DETECTION_ENABLED

environment.description: Action on a prompt secret match: block (reject), redact (replace matched spans before forwarding), or flag (allow and record).
environment.name: PROMPT_SECRET_MODE

environment.description: Built-in secret/PII detector names applied to prompts (credential detectors by default; PII detectors email/us_ssn/credit_card are opt-in).
environment.name: PROMPT_SECRET_PATTERNS

environment.description: Whether the short-window per-sandbox request rate limiter is enabled.
environment.name: RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED

environment.description: When the shared rate-limit backend (Redis) is unreachable, fail OPEN (admit with a logged warning + metric) instead of the default fail-closed 503. Deliberate availability-over-enforcement tradeoff; budgets stay fail-closed regardless.
environment.name: RATE_LIMIT_FAIL_OPEN

environment.description: Max requests per sandbox per rate-limit window; zero means unlimited.
environment.name: RATE_LIMIT_REQUESTS_PER_WINDOW

environment.description: Rate-limit fixed-window length in seconds.
environment.name: RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_SECONDS

environment.description: Runtime request timeout in seconds.
environment.name: REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environment.description: Redis key prefix for stored responses.
environment.name: RESPONSES_KEY_PREFIX

environment.description: Redis response-store operation timeout in seconds.
environment.name: RESPONSES_REDIS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environment.description: Redis URL for the shared response store when backend is redis.
environment.name: RESPONSES_REDIS_URL

environment.description: Retention TTL in seconds for stored responses before they expire.
environment.name: RESPONSES_RETENTION_SECONDS

environment.description: Backend for stored Responses objects.
environment.name: RESPONSES_STORE_BACKEND

environment.description: Whether the stateful Responses API surface (store=true, previous_response_id, GET/DELETE/input_items) is served. Off by default; storing responses persists raw conversation content (ADR 0012).
environment.name: RESPONSES_STORE_ENABLED

environment.description: Response cache backend.
environment.name: RESPONSE_CACHE_BACKEND

environment.description: Whether the exact-match per-sandbox response cache is enabled for non-streaming chat.
environment.name: RESPONSE_CACHE_ENABLED

environment.description: Redis key prefix for shared response-cache entries.
environment.name: RESPONSE_CACHE_KEY_PREFIX

environment.description: Maximum cached responses before LRU eviction.
environment.name: RESPONSE_CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES

environment.description: Redis response-cache operation timeout in seconds.
environment.name: RESPONSE_CACHE_REDIS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environment.description: Redis URL for the shared response cache when backend is redis.
environment.name: RESPONSE_CACHE_REDIS_URL

environment.description: Response cache entry time-to-live in seconds.
environment.name: RESPONSE_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS

environment.description: Runtime adapter used by the gateway.
environment.name: RUNTIME_BACKEND

environment.description: Consecutive runtime failures before opening the circuit; zero disables circuit breaking.
environment.name: RUNTIME_CIRCUIT_FAILURE_THRESHOLD

environment.description: Seconds before an opened runtime circuit is retried.
environment.name: RUNTIME_CIRCUIT_RESET_SECONDS

environment.description: Bounded retry count for runtime requests; retries cover transient 5xx/429 and connect errors (and pre-first-byte on the streaming path).
environment.name: RUNTIME_MAX_RETRIES

environment.description: Exponential retry backoff base in seconds (doubled per attempt, with equal jitter).
environment.name: RUNTIME_RETRY_BACKOFF_SECONDS

environment.description: Budget counter backend.
environment.name: SANDBOX_BUDGET_BACKEND

environment.description: Whether sandbox request and token budgets are enforced.
environment.name: SANDBOX_BUDGET_ENABLED

environment.description: Redis key prefix for sandbox budget counters.
environment.name: SANDBOX_BUDGET_KEY_PREFIX

environment.description: Redis budget operation timeout in seconds.
environment.name: SANDBOX_BUDGET_REDIS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environment.description: Redis URL for shared budget counters.
environment.name: SANDBOX_BUDGET_REDIS_URL

environment.description: Sandbox budget window in seconds.
environment.name: SANDBOX_BUDGET_WINDOW_SECONDS

environment.description: Maximum estimated prompt tokens per sandbox budget window; zero means unlimited.
environment.name: SANDBOX_ESTIMATED_TOKEN_BUDGET

environment.description: Optional path to a platform.ai/v1alpha1 SandboxPolicySet YAML file.
environment.name: SANDBOX_POLICY_PATH

environment.description: Maximum prompt characters per sandbox budget window; zero means unlimited.
environment.name: SANDBOX_PROMPT_CHAR_BUDGET

environment.description: Maximum requests per sandbox budget window; zero means unlimited.
environment.name: SANDBOX_REQUEST_BUDGET

environment.description: Estimated cost per 1000 tokens surfaced by /v1/usage; zero disables the cost model.
environment.name: USD_PER_1K_TOKENS

environment.description: Base URL for the vLLM runtime.
environment.name: VLLM_BASE_URL
